title: tagetes chinchilla
intro: Tagetes chinchilla, also known as the Chinchilla marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tagetes chinchilla include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Tagetes chinchilla is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is also used as a natural insect repellent due to its strong scent.
